headline: MAA Q1 2026 Earnings Beat EPS Estimates but Miss Revenue, Market Reaction Muted
summary: MAA's Q1 2026 earnings showed a major EPS beat ($2.13 vs $0.81 estimate) but a slight revenue miss ($553.7M vs $561.5M). The stock remained flat in after-hours trading, though shares have gained 7.1% over the past month.

headline: Mid-America Apartment Communities: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
summary: GERMANTOWN, Tenn. — GERMANTOWN, Tenn. — Mid-America Apartment Communities Inc. on Wednesday reported a key measure of profitability in its first quarter. The results exceeded Wall Street...
